subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of God, the Mighty, the All-Wise, unto all who dwell in the heavens and on earth, that they may inhale the fragrances of their Lord's verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الله العزیز الحکیم لمن فی السموات و الارضین لیجدن کل نفحات آیات ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation
